h0b640e66g96a5g48fcg92a7g952ea32a32b4: Please - get away! We're building a raft - we'll bloody swim if need be. Just leave us be.
hf53519f7ga0ebg4779gaa7bg5c48d651730a: ... where... where are we? There was... fire in the sky, and then...
h1ac98fe7g8e96g48cegad69g2f0c57a1ffec: The same thing that happens to anyone who attacks me.
h495a706dgf7dbg4e4egaad5g4e47da4c7c37: We didn't... we didn't mean to. We saw the wreckage and I thought... I thought I heard my daughter's voice.
heae10884g4865g45e6g8e23g39abab7baec8: I was defending myself. I'm sorry.
hdc58e61ag9c2bg4765g854egc6a7cc51db58: Gods, we just... we didn't know what we were doing. We heard a voice in the wreckage - my daughter's voice.
h1a0fab00gf31eg4896ga7ccg15cbc3eedd4c: Whatever was happening, it ended with that monster.
hce743432gbddfg49b8g91dbg7d9a5cebf4cb: Calm yourself - all is well now.
h02ce9e4ag45d7g4378g8d54gbd4470cf1bdd: You allowed yourself to be dominated by a ghaik. To be contaminated.
hf059a412gaa49g425ega733gdefbea4e4f77: It weren't our fault! We heard something calling out from the wreckage. It... it sounded like my daughter.
he1250993g5913g48b8g830cgfd26ce2bcb2b: ... oh gods, Sonna. What happened to my friend!?
h9426dea8g82cag4706gb831gbbb74e90d569: ... oh gods, Thale. What happened to my friend!?
h7f6129d1g7a79g48b5g9957g3d5331040edd: ... the voice. Oh, gods, the voice. What happened!?
h012bf57bg3022g4280g9a1dgdb9133066da1: You tried to kill me, that's what.
he28524fagf9cfg416dg9239gda64d0c32271: I'm sorry, I... I saw the crash. Heard someone screaming in the wreckage - my daughter.
hcd66f489g84f5g45e2gb6a8g7cb0428180dd: But... she's been dead for years. That thing got into our heads - drove us mad.
h94a69f87g3cc3g499cg9addgf8f1fb77f15a: We wrecked our boat just trying to get close to it. What do I do now?
h6335ad8fgec8bg44d8g9a9fg5588aeb898da: We wrecked our boat just trying to get close to it. What do we do now?
h01baa191g036dg43b3gaa12gaea964937cc6: It could be worse - your ship didn't fall out of the sky.
hc9adbfb3g2231g42e6gad13g847f949754bd: You were on that thing? To survive that, only to land in this bloody wilderness.
h2dec12a1gaaeag4ce6g92f3g121e17b800e9: We're in the middle of nowhere. The gods must have it out -
h5129b27bgdcf6g4c09ga17dgc19a15b44994: Wait. You... I can feel you. Just like one of those things. You're one of them!
ha9b35481g10aeg4052g8ad3g920c64a12f22: What? I saved you from that thing.
h7c704799gdaf7g45acg967fg129b685b61fc: There's something in your head! Please - I'll take my chances out here. Just... just don't hurt me any more!
he0b3cf54gb52fg4cffga2cfge4e461b055f3: There's something in your head! Please - we'll take our chances out here. Just... just leave us be!
h632ce905gde77g4763gb57agfc3097fe9241: Calm down. They abducted me, but I escaped.
hc208ed74g9c1bg4994gbf0eg3ccbfae08363: Show some gratitude, or you'll find that I'm a lot worse.
hf5a7797dg5f8bg4191gbbdeg92f8feec7ab6: First things first. Where are we?
hd20541dbg5dd4g4ad2g85fcg46d2d5ebc742: We're nowhere - that's the point. Even with a boat, Baldur's Gate is days -
h874e1533g8764g4043g9673ga678b7672344: Your boat - can it be repaired?
h39c4d26bg2770g493bg87dbga84edb1c0e9a: Not a chance - it's bloody driftwood. And we are in the middle of nowhere, even -
h4777d3bag110dg4474g8b52gf6259d8e9579: Figure it out yourself. I have neither time nor patience to train a new slave.
h02215a64ga082g471dgb158g174469c9e5df: Start by handing over your valuables.
hbeed91d2g9ad7g4191g8c82g1440c268ea91: That monster was using you like a puppet.
h648996eagf214g4d06gbd13g6850fa77324b: Gods, I... I think you're right. It called out from the wreckage. Sounded just like my daughter.
h4af4c3b2g50d5g4a70gb59dgf1f40b660882: It looked like you were helping that thing.
hafa6ab61g7086g4d40g94aag31eb55a8afef: This voice - what was it saying?
h29c400f0g9abeg4863g9618g03fccebdb915: It was... calling for help. Gods above, it sounded just like my daughter.
h1cbdda5dg807fg43a9gae78g6592ce411742: I'm sorry, it just... it sounded just like my daughter. I thought I was protecting her.
